No.2789-2014 05.032003 bearing Document No 3529 Volumne No.! !5 ؟ ؟١٧ regislered with SLb Registrar Aziz Bhatti Town Lahore, subsequent to whicli IlultiUn No.326 dated !6.05.2007 sanctioned favour rspundunl an0 possession VI3 handed UVer In furtherance ofthe agreement conVeyance deed petitioner was given 1 7 exempted plot files which he IIOII limc Iime UnC With0س objeilions Iiumi Ihe respundent huas been selling Lne SI. Petitioner being OVne another plot bearing N0.291-F Phase-VI DHA, Lahore applied Denlfd Cunificaie (NDC) whereupon revealed Ihal has buen معنسه marked FESDUIIULIiI because whicn puuitioner ٨١ ٨ ٨ ٨ ٦ sell his plot Feeling aggrieved present petition Ius becn fileu chullenying embargo placed on the rights of the petitioner Report parawise comments '٦٢ ruquisitiunedd from Ihe respundent which revealed that the said embargo has bcen placed because petitiuner has failed to fulfill his obligation under tne agreument conveyance deed Learned counisul for the petitioner Hubmits H٥0
